build.buildCommand: echo 'Using pre-built frontend dist from repo'

deploy.startCommand: REPO=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dyegofarias86-create/limpar-auto/main && for f in backend/routes/upload.js backend/routes/billing.js backend/routes/dashboard.js backend/server.js backend/routes/clients.js backend/routes/marketing.js; do curl -sf $REPO/$f -o $f && echo "refreshed $f"; done && cd backend && npm install && NODE_ENV=production node server.js
